description: Style NoteThis french connection tee indulges in a minimalist uncomplicated aesthetic. Layer this under a tailored jacket and fitted chinos (rolled up to show off your high-top sneakers) For a pared down look, we recommend a fitted pair of denims with no distressing or wash. Style this with low top shoes for maximum effect. Product DetailsBlue polo T-shirt, has a slim tipped collar, a hlaf buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash coldIron on reverseWash with similar coloursSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
